themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Covers AI agents designed to perform research tasks autonomously, including browsing, data gathering, and analysis.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Focuses on AI tools that help developers write, debug, and review code, improving productivity and quality.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles about specific AI applications and platforms designed to enhance various stages of the research process.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Explores how AI is being integrated into the design and research workflows for product development.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Discusses AI capabilities for condensing large amounts of text, data, or meeting transcripts into concise summaries.

themes.name: Conversational AI in research
themes.description: Articles about using AI chatbots and conversational interfaces to conduct research, gather feedback, or assist users.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Examines how AI is affecting job roles, skill requirements, and the overall labor market, particularly in research and development.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Covers AI applications used to analyze and understand user sentiment, opinions, and feedback from various sources.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Articles focusing on how AI can assist in product strategy, development, and decision-making processes.

themes.name: AI ethics in research
themes.description: Addresses the ethical considerations, challenges, and responsible development of AI in research and user experience.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
